output.code:
# Load the raw text
path = "/mnt/data/file-5pPia53ut879z99CmxX1xN-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'rb') as f:
    raw = f.read()
# decode as utf-8
text = raw.decode('utf-8')
len(text), text[:200]

import re

# find all quoted substrings with indices
subs = []
for m in re.finditer(r'"([^"]+)"', text):
    span = text[m.start(1): m.end(1)]
    subs.append((m.start(1), m.end(1), span))
subs
